stemHtml:
Refer to figure or VFR Chart ED-4 from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
Choose the correct statement on a standard day regarding the airspace above Stuttgart Airport (EDDS, N48°41.4', E009°13.3').

options.a: At 4000 ft AMSL you would be in class C airspace.
options.b: At 4000 ft AMSL you would be in class D airspace.
options.c: At 2000 ft AMSL you would be in class E airspace.
options.d: At 5000 ft AMSL you would be in class G airspace.
